results.title: Ashwini More | Senior HR Business Partner at Khoros
results.author: Ashwini More
results.text:
# Ashwini More

Senior HR Business Partner at Khoros

Senior Human Resources Business Partner at Khoros

Bengaluru, Karnataka, India (IN)

500 connections • 4,664 followers

## About

I’m a confident, hardworking go-getter with HRBP. Some of my inherent characteristics being hardworking, dedicated, good interpersonal skills, combined with ability to work in a team and quick adjustment to the new situation and work. HR Professional with a strong experience of 9 years in handling the complete gamut of HR activities.

Total Experience: 13 years and 8 months

## Experience

### Senior Human Resources Business Partner at Khoros (Current)

Apr 2022 - Present • 3 years and 10 months

Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

Company: 501-1000 employees • Founded 2019 • Privately Held • Software Development

Department: Human Resources • Level: Senior

### Human Resources Manager at Elocity

Feb 2020 - Mar 2022 • 2 years and 1 month

Bengaluru Area, India

Company: 11-50 employees • Founded 2018 • Privately Held • Electrical Equipment Manufacturing

Department: Human Resources • Level: Manager

### Assistant Manager Human Resources at Udaan.com

Mar 2019 - Feb 2020 • 11 months

Bangalore

Company: 1001-5000 employees • Founded 2016 • Privately Held • Technology, Information and Internet

Department: Human Resources • Level: Manager

### AM - HR Operations at AJIO.com

Apr 2016 - Feb 2019 • 2 years and 10 months

Bangalore

Company: 501-1000 employees • Public Company • Retail

- Good Knowledge in HR SAP tool - Preparing the daily, weekly & Monthly reports for stakeholders by accessing data from SAP using different Info types & Transactions. - Managing complete Organisation Structure on Ms Visio & SAP on weekly basis. - Handling Personnel Management. -Induction & Onboarding. - Document verifica - Ability to maintain highly confidential information & processing confidential documents. - Handling of Employee queries within agreed SLA. - Taking care Internal & Intercompany transfers. - Perfomance Management System. - Handling complete Separation process. Show less

Department: Human Resources • Level: Specialist

### Talent Acquisition Engagement Specialist at AJIO.com

Jul 2015 - Mar 2016 • 8 months

Bengaluru Area, India

Company: 501-1000 employees • Public Company • Retail

Department: Human Resources • Level: Specialist

### Sr.Executive HR at Concentrix Limited Company

Jun 2014 - Jun 2015 • 1 year

Bengaluru Area, India

Company: 10,001+ employees • Public Company • IT Services and IT Consulting

Department: Human Resources • Level: Senior

### Executive - Talent Sourcing at Myriad Consulting

Jan 2013 - Dec 2013 • 11 months

## List of Khoros's Acquisitions

Filter this list

Khoros has completed 7 acquisitions. Peak acquisition activity occurred in 2021 with 2 acquisitions, and in 2018 and 2014, each with 1. Its acquisition activity spans 2 countries, with 6 acquisitions in United States and 1 in Netherlands. It has engaged in acquisitions across 5 sectors, including MarketingTech with 4 acquisitions, Customer Service Software with 4 acquisitions, and Customer Success Management with 1. Over the last five years (2020-2025), the average number of acquisitions per year stands at 0.4, with 0 acquisitions completed in the current calendar year. The most recent acquisition was Flow.ai, a platform providing chatbot solutions for businesses, founded in 2016 in Amsterdam, which occurred in January 2021.

### KhorosGeneral Information
#### Description
Developer of an engagement platform software intended to deliver a digital customer experience. The company provides a centralized cloud-based platform for social media management that allows brands to monitor and scale social marketing and social customer service, facilitate millions of conversations and drive smarter decisions through data, helping connect customers, content and conversations at the right digital moment.
